data.title: What's Going On With Occidental Petroleum Stock Wednesday?
data.description: Occidental Petroleum shares are moving higher on Wednesday following a drone attack on a Russian pipeline, which could weaken supply.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Will Trump's Tariffs Hurt Or Help Stock Market? 59% Say This…
data.description: A Benzinga reader poll predicts the outcome Trump's tariffs could have on the stock market in 2025.

data.title: Rivian's Technical Setup Signals Strength Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
data.description: Rivian (RIVN) reports Q4 earnings on Thursday. Stock down 11.42% in past year, up 6.23% YTD. Bullish momentum with stock trading above key moving averages and support from analysts with 2% downside.

data.title: What's Going On With BWX Technologies Stock Today?
data.description: BWX Technologies secures $2.1 billion in contracts from the U.S. Naval Nuclear Propulsion Program. The deals involve manufacturing reactor components for the Columbia and Virginia class submarines, and Ford class aircraft carriers.
